items.title: Van Persie fan van St. Juste: 'Ik weet wat voor een persoon hij is'
items.summary: Kort voor de wedstrijd tegen Sturm Graz maakte Feyenoord bekend dat het Jeremiah St. Juste binnen heeft gehaald, trainer Robin van Persie kon er daardoor op reageren richting het Europa League-duel.

items.title: Transfers Feyenoord: zoektocht naar backs voelt wrang voor analytici
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij Feyenoord op de voet, zeker nu de winterse transferwindow in aantocht is. De doelwitten van de Rotterdammers, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: Slot en Stam schitteren in jubileumshirt van PEC Zwolle
items.summary: PEC Zwolle luistert het 115-jarige bestaan van de club op met een jubileumshirt. Legendarische spelers als Arne Slot en Jaap Stam leenden zich voor de campagne en poseerden in het collector's item.

items.title: Midfielder Casemiro to leave Man Utd this summer
items.summary: Manchester United say midfielder Casemiro will leave the club when his contract expires at the end of this season.

items.title: Forest close in on Napoli striker Lucca
items.summary: Nottingham Forest are closing in on the signing of Napoli striker Lorenzo Lucca.

items.title: Casemiro to leave Man United at end of the season
items.summary: Casemiro will leave Manchester United when his contract expires at the end of the season, the club have confirmed.

items.title: MLS extends transfer window to align with Europe
items.summary: The MLS summer transfer window, also known as the secondary window, will extend into September for the 2026 season, continuing an ongoing push by the league to align with the schedule of global soccer.

items.title: L'pool top English club in Money League; Utd fall
items.summary: Real Madrid topped the latest Deloitte Football Money League rankings, generating a record €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion) in revenue, with the top 20 teams represented clearing €12.4 billion ($14.5 billion) when combined, also a record.

items.title: Szoboszlai: 'I did my homework' on trick free kick
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai said he did his "homework" paid off on his trick free kick that gave Liverpool the lead in a 3-0 win at Marseille in the Champions League on Wednesday.

items.title: Casemiro kondigt aankomend vertrek bij Manchester United aan
items.summary: Aan het einde van dit seizoen vertrekt Casemiro (33) transfervrij bij Manchester United. Dit heeft de Braziliaanse middenvelder zelf bekendgemaakt via het clubkanaal. Man Utd had een optie om het aflopende contract te verlengen, maar hier wordt geen gebruik van gemaakt.

items.title: Casemiro to leave Manchester United in the summer after four seasons
items.summary: Brazil midfielder, 34 next month, out of contract He wants early announcement to help find new club Casemiro will leave Manchester United when his contract expires in the summer after the club decided not to trigger a one-year extension. United have chosen to part ways at this point to allow time to shape their summer transfer strategy. There is an eagerness to refresh the midfield as part of a squad overhaul, the ambition being to recruit younger players for the long term. Casemiro earns about £430,000 a week and his departure will help free up funds for signings. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Napoli neemt na halfjaar alweer afscheid van Ajax-flop Lucca'
items.summary: De tijd van winterse versterkingen is aangebroken, in dit blog volgen we alle transferactiviteit in het buitenland. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: Football Daily | Manchester United the TV show? Bring on the Battle of the Buffet
items.summary: Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now! The last time Manchester United tried to milk a few extra million quid, last summer, the club embarked on an ill-timed and ill-thought out post-season tour of Asia, which quickly turned into a PR farce. The 1-0 defeat against the “Asean All Stars”, a scratch, invitational side that had never previously played together, didn’t help but the tour was plagued by their fatigued, uninterested players looking utterly fed up, some of them sulking, yawning and even sticking their middle fingers up at fans who had come out to watch them play. Around £8m-£10m was estimated to have been generated, but at what cost? Continue reading...

items.title: Sutton's predictions v 'Roy Keane' - Saipan star Hardwicke
items.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on actor Éanna Hardwicke, who plays Roy Keane in the new film Saipan - and AI - with his predictions for this week's Premier League fixtures.

items.title: England collapse to defeat against Sri Lanka as ODI struggles continue
items.summary: England's alarming ODI slump continued as Harry Brook's side slid to a 19-run defeat to Sri Lanka in the series opener at Colombo.

items.title: Heated Rivalry stars to carry Olympic Torch ahead of Winter Games
items.summary: The stars of Heated Rivalry will be torchbearers during the Olympic Torch Relay ahead of the opening ceremony of the Winter Games in Milan next month.

items.title: Spurs have no plans to allow Van de Ven exit with contract talks planned
items.summary: Tottenham have no plans to allow Micky van de Ven to leave, with the club planning contract talks with the defender.

items.title: Familiar faces Duran, Asensio start for Fenerbahce vs Aston Villa LIVE!
Leicester sign Switzerland forward Alisha Lehmann from FC Como
items.summary: Club continues January push for experienced players Kelly Gago wants to leave Everton, says Brian Sørensen Leicester have signed the Switzerland forward Alisha Lehmann from FC Como. The WSL club have been targeting experienced players this month, having often had the youngest average age in the division in their starting XI this season. Lehmann, who has played in England’s top flight for West Ham, Everton and Aston Villa, has 64 caps and was part of the Swiss squad at Euro 2025. She has signed a contract to 2028. “It feels like a homecoming, coming back to England, and I’m really happy,” she said. Continue reading...

items.title: McIlroy eight behind surprise leader Molinari at Dubai Desert Classic
items.summary: Rory McIlroy carded a double-bogey seven as part of a disappointing one-over round of 73 that has him trailing surprise leader Francesco Molinari by eight strokes after the first round of the Dubai Desert Classic.
